name: George Olsen
abstract: George Edward Olsen Sr. (March 18, 1893 – March 18, 1971) was an American musician and bandleader.

about_quotes.speaker: Al Gallodoro
about_quotes.evidence: But when I got to Atlantic City, George Olsen had left the night before. So I was more or less stuck.

about_quotes.speaker: Al Gallodoro
about_quotes.evidence: He said, “He’s playing with George Olsen.” George Olsen was a big name at this time.
about_quotes.doc_title: Al Gallodoro interviewed by Monk Rowe, Oneonta, New York, December 28, 2005
